title: callostylis benchaii

The plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and improving sleep quality. The therapeutic actions of Callostylis benchaii are attributed to its bioactive constituents, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
